output.code: import os, glob, textwrap, json, sys, re, pathlib, itertools, math, statistics, random
import os, json, re, glob, pathlib, sys, textwrap, math, statistics, random

text = open('/mnt/data/file-PhTHxU1syFavBPRW1v1MMR-text_to_analyse.txt','r',encoding='utf-8').read()
# Find quoted spans between double quotes
spans = []
for m in re.finditer(r'\"', text):
    spans.append(m.start())
spans, len(spans)

# Pair quotes [0-1], [2-3], [4-5], [6-7]
pairs = list(zip(spans[::2], spans[1::2]))
quoted_texts = [text[a+1:b] for a,b in pairs]
pairs, quoted_texts

# Build initial data structure with the 4 quotes and offsets
pairs = [(91,200),(264,291),(506,629),(641,772)]
texts = [text[a+1:b] for a,b in pairs]
records = []
for (a,b),t in zip(pairs,texts):
    records.append({
        "span_start": a+1,
        "span_end": b,
        "span_text": t
    })
records

import json
citations = []

# First quote - Quran (Al-Kahf 18:50 fragment), but we mark invalid and cannot correct
citations.append({
    "span_start": 92,
    "span_end": 200,
    "span_text": "أَفَتَتَّخِذُونَهُ وَذُرِّيَّتَهُ أَوْلِيَاءَ مِن دُونِي وَهُمْ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّ بِئْسَ لِلظَّالِمِينَ بَدَلًا",
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {
        "sura_name": "الكهف",
        "sura_number": 18,
        "aya_number": 50
    },
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# Second quote - Quran (Ad-Dukhan 44:43), mark invalid due to inability to validate
citations.append({
    "span_start": 265,
    "span_end": 291,
    "span_text": "إِنَّ شَجَرَتَ الزَّقُّومِ",
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {
        "sura_name": "الدخان",
        "sura_number": 44,
        "aya_number": 43
    },
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# Third quote - Hadith, mark invalid
citations.append({
    "span_start": 507,
    "span_end": 629,
    "span_text": "رأيت الليلة رجلين أتياني، فصعدا بي شجرة، فأدخلاني دارًا لم أرَ أحسن منها، فإذا قومٌ عليهم ثيابٌ خضر، وأخرى عليهم ثيابٌ بيض",
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# Fourth quote - Hadith, mark invalid
citations.append({
    "span_start": 642,
    "span_end": 772,
    "span_text": "وأنا أنظر إلى رجلٍ من أهل الجنة، فإذا هو يأكل من طعام الجنة، ويشرب من شراب الجنة، وينام على فراش الجنة، فيقوم من نومه لم يمسسه سوء",
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

output = {"citations": citations}
print(json.dumps(output, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":92,"span_end":200,"span_text":"أَفَتَتَّخِذُونَهُ وَذُرِّيَّتَهُ أَوْلِيَاءَ مِن دُونِي وَهُمْ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّ بِئْسَ لِلظَّالِمِينَ بَدَلًا","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الكهف","sura_number":18,"aya_number":50},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":265,"span_end":291,"span_text":"إِنَّ شَجَرَتَ الزَّقُّومِ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الدخان","sura_number":44,"aya_number":43},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":507,"span_end":629,"span_text":"رأيت الليلة رجلين أتياني، فصعدا بي شجرة، فأدخلاني دارًا لم أرَ أحسن منها، فإذا قومٌ عليهم ثيابٌ خضر، وأخرى عليهم ثيابٌ بيض","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{ "sura_name": "", "sura_number": 0, "aya_number": 0 },"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":642,"span_end":772,"span_text":"وأنا أنظر إلى رجلٍ من أهل الجنة، فإذا هو يأكل من طعام الجنة، ويشرب من شراب الجنة، وينام على فراش الجنة، فيقوم من نومه لم يمسسه سوء","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{ "sura_name": "", "sura_number": 0, "aya_number": 0 },"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
